chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5288 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.30089/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.04.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Hanif Faisal Alam, advocate for the respondent No.5. Mr. Ahsan Gul, advocate holding brief for Mr. Zuber Ahmed Rajput, advocate for the respondent No.3. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Per learned counsel, this petition is not maintainable, inter alia, as it pertains to asserting rights in immovable property in district Jamshoro; is in the nature of a harassment, which ought not to be entertained in view of Division Bench judgment of this court reported as PLD 2019 168 [Abdul Hameed v. Province of Sindh]; raised factual controversies not amenable in writ jurisdiction. Memorandum of petition has been perused and corroborates objection raised by the counsel. In view hereof, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
